title: PRD integrity audit
notes: Analyze the PRD and UI prototype for consistency and gaps, then write .codalio/prd-integrity-report.json

title: Data model design
notes: Design the database schema, models, relationships, and multi-tenancy ownership

title: Permissions and Extras design
notes: Define roles, permissions, and identify Extras (custom policies, validations, etc.)

title: Screens and UI handoff mapping
notes: Map screens, routes, hooks, and actions, and write .codalio/ui-handoff.json if prototype exists
